series_metadata.series_description: Requests and Subpoenas for either public records or confidential or non-public information/records. The subpoenas covered by this records series are those issued to ODJFS when ODJFS is not a party to the litigation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 year , then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years from date of receipt, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
